1.content:
So after Spike ripped Lil's diaper off he continues to sniff Lil's anus. When all of a sudden Spike gets naughty with Lil. How does Spike get naughty with Lil? Does either Tommy, Chuckie,or Phil or do all of them repeat anything they see Spike doing to Lil?

(a) he pees on Lil. Yes but only Chuckie
(b) he licks Lil's anus and vagina. Yes but only Phil does but only her vagina
(c) he goes from sniffing Lil's anus to sniffing her vagina. Phil does but only her vagina
(d) he mounts Lil like she's a female dog and humps her with his penis in her anus. No because they're trying to stop Spike.
(e) he mounts Lil like she's a female dog and humps her with his penis in her vagina. Yes Tommy, Chuckie, and Phil
1.title: Spike gets naughty with Lil. How the others react

info.brief_description: Didi see Chuckie trying to pee on a tree like Spike. The babies try to potty train Spike.
info.description: After Didi stops Chuckie from peeing on a tree. Tommy and his friends try to keep Spike from peeing on the tree. So they first try making Spike use the toilet, but when that fails they try putting a diaper on Spike. When all of a sudden Spike rips the diaper off himself. Spike then starts to smell Lil's diaper. What does Spike do to Lil after he rips her diaper off.
